The '''SoroSuub AQ-1 Submersi-speeder''' was an [[amphibious speeder]], both an elegant watercraft and stylish downtown [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]]. The model was especially popular on [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]], where frequent travel was required to underwater facilities, such as [[vault-spire]]s.
